output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-130","author":"SarahJ_84","text":"I can't believe how many people are DMing me non-stop about 'exposing' my friends at the local cinema. It started as a joke but now it's just endless messages saying I need to stop going there and telling everyone who knows me. It feels like they're trying to ruin my reputation for no reason.","category":"Harassment","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This case involves sustained unwanted contact and potential coordinated harassment rather than a single insult, requiring specialist investigation into the pattern of behaviour.","day":1,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}"
